{{CargoRelic
|name=We Are Family
|class_id=20159
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=When Snails and Birds say "We Are Family," those who don't have a clue may be moved by their strong bonds. Yet, beneath superficial greetings lies secret malice against each other.
|fame=16
|art=32
|fth=14
|civ=15
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail ATK +40<br>Per 1 Egg hatched, Snail ATK +2<br>Eggs hatched: 40/40
|ss2=Snail ATK +70<br>Per 1 Egg hatched, Snail ATK +4<br>Eggs hatched: 40/40
|ss3=Snail ATK +100<br>Per 1 Egg hatched, Snail ATK +6<br>Eggs hatched: 40/40
|ss4=Snail ATK +100<br>Per 1 Egg hatched, Snail ATK +6<br>Eggs hatched: 40/40
|ss7=Snail ATK +100<br>Per 1 Egg hatched, Snail ATK +6<br>Eggs hatched: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
